title: ACES Scenario Pack — Runtime Visibility (v0)
description: Classifies each declared pack artifact root by who may see it at runtime. This axis is orthogonal to, and composable with, the artifact-boundary disposition axis (how an artifact enters the pack): a single root may be classified by both, and neither substitutes for the other. Visibility is a contract classification over pack-relative roots, not a mandated directory layout; packs map existing roots to tiers rather than being forced into literal public/operator/oracle directories. Participant-visible roots are subject to a leak scan and a packaging boundary split so operator/oracle material never leaks into a participant artifact.

packId.description: Pack this runtime-visibility record applies to.

roots.description: Declared pack artifact roots, each mapped to exactly one runtime-visibility tier.

path.description: Pack-relative path to the artifact root: a file or directory subtree. A contract mapping, not a required directory name. Roots must not overlap across different tiers (a root nested inside another with a different tier is rejected), so staging and scanning stay within one tier.

visibility.description: Who may see this root at runtime. participant-visible (public): may be shown to scenario participants; leak-scanned and staged to the participant release root. operator-only: limited to operators running the scenario. oracle-only (private): answers, proof, and scoring internals; never participant-visible. distribution-restricted: bundled content a catalog may ship only to licensed operators.

note.description: Short rationale for the tier assignment.
